nodes.name: Sicalis
nodes.summary: Sicalis（Sicalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Stripe-tailed yellow finch、Puna yellow finch、Bright-rumped yellow finch等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: Stripe-tailed yellow finch
nodes.summary: The stripe-tailed yellow finch (Sicalis citrina) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Guyana, Paraguay, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are dry savanna and pastureland. References External links "Stripe-tailed Yellow-Finch" photo gallery VIREO
